=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (11:41-11:66) TS377033: This expression chains multiple `Effect.provide` calls. Providing Layers in multiple calls in a chain can break service lifecycle behavior compared with a single combined provide with merged layers. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
  Fix 0: "Disable multipleEffectProvide for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable multipleEffectProvide for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Combine into a single provide"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable multipleEffectProvide for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable multipleEffectProvide for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Combine into a single provide" ===

--- file:///.src/multipleEffectProvide_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics multipleEffectProvide:warning
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class A extends Context.Service<A>()("A", { make: Effect.succeed({}) }) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class B extends Context.Service<B>()("B", { make: Effect.succeed({}) }) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
export const preview = Effect.void.pipe(Effect.provide(Layer.mergeAll(A.Default, B.Default)))
